caption.full:
Tom Holland praises Robert Pattinson's casting in The Odyssey

Tom Holland expressed relief when Robert Pattinson joined the cast of The Odyssey. Holland joked that Pattinson is 'so good at being a dickhead,' noting they have made three movies together. In the film, Holland plays Telemachus and Pattinson is Antinous.

Send this to a friend who loves Robert Pattinson!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #TheOdyssey #RobertPattinson
caption.firstComment: Tom’s quote is both the funniest and most accurate casting note ever—do you agree that the dynamic works or is it a hard pass for you?

youtube.title: Tom Holland on Robert Pattinson's 'Dickhead' Role in The Odyssey
youtube.description:
Tom Holland felt immediate relief when Robert Pattinson was cast as Antinous in Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey. Holland joked that Pattinson is "so good at being a dickhead." Tom Holland portrays Telemachus, while Robert Pattinson plays Antinous, one of the suitors for Penelope, who is played by Anne Hathaway. Matt Damon stars as Odysseus. Holland and Pattinson have previously made three movies together.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
